title: Y Facilities - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Youth Services > Y Facilities 17 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF ASHLAND FAMILY YMCA COMMUNITY RECREATION CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers a variety of recreation opportunities: aquatic center, gym and group exercise classes, youth and adult sports. Preschool and afterschool programs also provided. 540 YMCA Way Ashland, OR 97520 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Facility: Monday-Friday 5am-9pm, Saturday 8am-6pm, Sunday 8am-5pm Pool: Monday-Friday 5:30am-8:30pm, Saturday 8am-5:30pm, Sunday 9am-4:30pm Email (541) 482-9622 Get Directions Visit Website More Details EUGENE FAMILY YMCA COMMUNITY RECREATION CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers a variety of recreation opportunities, including an aquatic center, gym, group exercise classes, preschool, afterschool childcare, family fun events, and youth and adult sports. Also provides teen youth clubs and drop-in events. The Virtual Y Hub provides on-demand videos for fitness, yoga, meditation, and more that people can watch at home. 600 E 24th Avenue Eugene, OR 97405 Eligibility: Unrestricted, some programs require YMCA membership Hours: Varies by site Email (541) 686-9622 Get Directions Visit Website More Details ROGUE VALLEY FAMILY YMCA COMMUNITY RECREATION CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers a variety of recreation opportunities: an aquatic center, gym and group exercise classes, youth and adult sports. Provides lifeguard training, swimming lessons, nutrition education, and a preschool program. Volunteer opportunities available. 522 W 6th Street Medford, OR 97501 Eligibility: Unrestricted; some programs are specific to defined age groups Hours: Monday-Friday 5am-9pm, Saturday 8am-3pm Email (541) 772-6295 103 Get Directions Visit Website More Details YMCA OF BAKER COUNTY COMMUNITY RECREATION CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers a variety of recreation opportunities including an aquatic center, gym, group exercise classes, and youth and adult sports. 3715 Pocahontas Road Baker City, OR 97814 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Varies by service (541) 523-8326 Get Directions Visit Website More Details YMCA OF COLUMBIA-WILLAMETTE BEAVERTON FAMILY YMCA COMMUNITY RECREATION CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers a variety of recreation opportunities including an aquatic center, gym, group exercise classes, and youth and adult sports. 9685 SW Harvest Court Beaverton, OR 97005 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Varies by service Email (503) 644-2191 Get Directions Visit Website More Details YMCA OF COLUMBIA-WILLAMETTE BEAVERTON FAMILY YMCA CHILDCARE & MORE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers a variety of preschool, afterschool, and enrichment classes such as art and dance at locations throughout the community. 9685 SW Harvest Court Beaverton, OR 97005 Eligibility: Ages 0-18; most activities for ages 0-12 Hours: Varies by service Email (503) 223-9622 Get Directions Visit Website More Details YMCA OF DOUGLAS COUNTY COMMUNITY RECREATION CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers a variety of recreational opportunities, including racquetball, pickle ball, basketball, family activities, ADA accessible hot tubs, a steam room, a sauna, and two pools. Also has a gym with group exercise classes, swimming classes for all ages and abilities, water safety education, specialized wellness programs for seniors and people living with chronic diseases, preschool and after school child care programs, children's play groups, and a teen program. 1151 NW Stewart Parkway Roseburg, OR 97471 Eligibility: Unrestricted; individuals must not have a registered sex offense or conviction of a violent crime. -Preschool serves ages 2.5-5 -After school child care program Kindergarten-5th grade Hours: Monday-Friday 5am-8pm, Saturday 8am-5pm Email (541) 440-9622 230 Get Directions Visit Website More Details YMCA OF GRANTS PASS COMMUNITY RECREATION CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers a variety of recreation opportunities, including an aquatic center, gym and group exercise classes, certified lifeguard classes, youth and adult sports, and preschool and after-school child care programs. 1000 Redwood Avenue Grants Pass, OR 97527 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 5am-9pm, Saturday 8am-5pm Email (541) 474-0001 Get Directions Visit Website More Details YMCA OF KLAMATH FALLS COMMUNITY RECREATION CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers a variety of recreation opportunities: aquatic center, gym and group exercise classes, youth and adult sports. Also provides preschool and after-school childcare programs. 1221 S Alameda Avenue Klamath Falls, OR 97603 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Saturday 5am-8pm Email (541) 884-4149 Get Directions Visit Website More Details YMCA OF MARION AND POLK COUNTIES MONMOUTH- INDEPENDENCE FAMILY YMCA COMMUNITY RECREATION CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers a variety of recreation opportunities; gym and group exercise classes; youth and adult sports. 425 Gwinn Street E Monmouth, OR 97361 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: No standard hours Email (503) 838-4042 Get Directions Visit Website More Details YMCA OF MARION AND POLK COUNTIES SILVER FALLS FAMILY YMCA COMMUNITY RECREATION CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers a variety of recreational opportunities including an aquatic center, gym and group exercise classes, and youth and adult sports. Provides CPR, First Aid, baby sitter, and Lifeguard training classes. 3201 Pacific Boulevard SW Albany, OR 97321 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: No standard hours Email (541) 926-4488 Get Directions Visit Website More Details YMCA OF TILLAMOOK COUNTY COMMUNITY RECREATION CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers a variety of recreation opportunities, youth and adult sports are offered as well. 610 Stillwell Avenue Tillamook, OR 97141 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: No standard hours Email (503) 842-9622 Get Directions Visit Website More Details ASHLAND FAMILY YMCA COMMUNITY RECREATION CENTER EUGENE FAMILY YMCA COMMUNITY RECREATION CENTER ROGUE VALLEY FAMILY YMCA COMMUNITY RECREATION CENTER YMCA OF BAKER COUNTY COMMUNITY RECREATION CENTER YMCA OF COLUMBIA-WILLAMETTE COMMUNITY RECREATION CENTER YMCA OF COLUMBIA-WILLAMETTE COMMUNITY RECREATION CENTER YMCA OF COLUMBIA-WILLAMETTE COMMUNITY RECREATION CENTER YMCA OF COLUMBIA-WILLAMETTE CHILDCARE & MORE YMCA OF COLUMBIA-WILLAMETTE CHILDCARE & MORE YMCA OF DOUGLAS COUNTY COMMUNITY RECREATION CENTER YMCA OF GRANTS PASS COMMUNITY RECREATION CENTER YMCA OF KLAMATH FALLS COMMUNITY RECREATION CENTER YMCA OF MARION AND POLK COUNTIES COMMUNITY RECREATION CENTER YMCA OF MARION AND POLK COUNTIES COMMUNITY RECREATION CENTER YMCA OF MARION AND POLK COUNTIES COMMUNITY RECREATION CENTER YMCA OF MID-WILLAMETTE COMMUNITY RECREATION CENTER YMCA OF TILLAMOOK COUNTY COMMUNITY RECREATION CENTER
